title: Ergosphere Angular Velocity Range
desc: Derives allowed angular velocity range inside ergosphere, narrowing to Ω_H at horizon.

title: 干涉仪噪声组成与量子噪声分析
desc: 分析干涉仪噪声源，包括量子噪声、热噪声等，以及其对灵敏度的影响。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 8: Angular Momentum
desc: Proofs of commutator identities for general angular momentum operators.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 9: Pauli Matrices
desc: Proves Pauli matrix identities and spin operators for quantum mechanics.

title: 统计力学第10次作业：自由电子气体
desc: 计算绝对零度下自由电子气体的平均速率、费米能量、内能和简并压。

title: Debye Model: Partition Function and Thermodynamics
desc: Derives ln Z, internal energy, and entropy for solids in high and low temperature limits.

title: Photon Field Energy-Momentum Tensor
desc: Derives gauge invariant, traceless energy-momentum tensor for photon field.

title: Lorentz Invariance and Optical Theorem
desc: Proving Lorentz invariance of inner product and deriving optical theorem from S-matrix unitarity.

title: Dyson Series and On-Shell Factorization
desc: Derivation of Dyson series for transition amplitude with source j.

title: Null Momentum Spinor Decomposition and LGTs
desc: Derives spinor expressions for null momentum with p0<0 and shows LGT action on |k>.

title: Gluon Amplitude Factorization Analysis
desc: Shows vanishing of all-plus 4-pt amplitude and u-channel factorization for 4-gluon amplitude.

title: Non-Relativistic Limit in QFT
desc: Leading order effects and NR limit for charged scalar particles with massless exchange.

title: Spinor Helicity for Massless Amplitudes
desc: Bootstrap massless amplitudes using spinor helicity formalism and Lorentz group decomposition.

title: Bose-Einstein Condensation in 2D and 3D
desc: Proofs that 2D ideal Bose gas has no BEC; 3D harmonic trap shows BEC with critical temperature.

title: QFT Lecture 7: Field Theory Basics
desc: Covers QFT Hamiltonian, causality, renormalization, perturbation theory, and photon field.

title: 量子力学中心力场作业分析
desc: 二体系统动能算符分解及球方势阱束缚态条件推导。

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 7
desc: Seventh assignment covering key quantum mechanics concepts.

title: Feynman Diagrams for Beginners
desc: A concise introduction to Feynman diagrams with exercises, covering QED calculations.
link: /physics/Quantum Physics/Quantum Field Theory/Feynman Diagrams for Beginners

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework 3: Phase Transition
desc: Derives molar internal energy change and latent heat variation with temperature.

title: 统计力学第6次作业分析
desc: 二维气体速度分布与相对速率分布推导及平均速率计算。

title: Lecture 6: Four-Particle Test & Yang-Mills
desc: Analyzing four-particle amplitudes, scalar self-interactions, and Yang-Mills theory with spin-1 particles.

title: Gravitational Waves: Generation, Propagation, Detection
desc: Linearized gravity approach to Einstein equations for gravitational wave analysis.
link: /physics/General Relativity/Gravitational Waves/Gravitational Waves Formation and Propagation

title: 统计力学第7次作业：熵与磁化
desc: 求解爱因斯坦固体熵及顺磁体磁化强度与磁化率。

title: 量子力学作业：阶跃势与概率守恒
desc: 求解阶跃势反射透射系数，证明R+T=1及左右入射透射相等。

title: 量子力学对称性与守恒量分析
desc: 证明自由粒子角动量守恒及Feynman-Hellmann定理。

title: On-Shell Factorization in QFT
desc: Analyzes Green functions and poles in momentum space for scalar particles.

title: Schwarzschild Killing Vectors Analysis
desc: Proving δ^μ_t and δ^μ_φ are Killing vectors of Schwarzschild metric.

title: General Relativity Homework 5: Metric Analysis
desc: Compute connection and Ricci tensor for a time-dependent spherically symmetric metric.

title: Quantum Mechanics Homework 4 Analysis
desc: Proves operator identities and uncertainty relation generalization.

title: 统计力学作业：混合粒子系统最概然分布
desc: 计算经典、玻色、费米子最概然分布，β对应温度。
